subject: A large horned, bull-headed humanoid creature erupts through a room while investigators look on from the side
description: A massive bull-headed, horned humanoid in a dark leather coat roars and surges forward with arms raised, disrupting everything around it. Papers, a green bottle, a magnifying glass, and other debris fly outward from the eruption of force. Behind the creature, a swirling blue-white energy vortex dominates the left side of the image. To the right, at least two smaller humanoid figures react — one bracing, one retreating — in what appears to be an office or study interior. The palette contrasts warm amber interior lighting on the right against cool supernatural blue on the left, with the minotaur-type figure dark and imposing at the center. The scene reads as an interrogation or confrontation interrupted by overwhelming power.
foreground: bull-headed horned humanoid roaring with arms raised, debris flying
background: office interior with amber light, two humanoid bystanders reacting
emotion: rage, chaos — creature roaring, bystanders recoiling
